content.en:
The hall master of the Forbidden Hall took more than a hundred Dao Ancestors to kill Dao Mountain, and this time the Forbidden Hall almost poured out, and it was bound to win.

Daoshan Boundary, Central Chaos Region.

An incomparably large Dao Realm stood here, this was the first Dao Realm in the Dao Mountain Realm, and it was also the largest Dao Realm, and countless universes around it were dotted in the chaotic void like stars.

These universes and large universes are all subordinate universes of Daoshan, and they send a large number of geniuses to Daoshan.

For a long time, I don't know how many transcendents have detached from the universe and joined Daoshan.

Because of this, Daoshan never needs to recruit geniuses in various places in Chaos, of course, if there is really that kind of genius who is very against the sky, Daoshan will also recruit them.

Of course, these subsidiary universes were not born naturally, but Dao Mountains were moved from all over the Dao Mountain Realm one by one.

But since Daoshan finished doing this, he didn't allow other forces to move the universe by the way, saying that it would affect the rules of the entire Daoshan realm.

This incident also aroused the anger of many forces, but they did not dare to offend Daoshan.

At this time.

In the distance of the Dao Mountain Realm, the Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall came here, looking at the huge Dao Mountain Realm and the countless universes, their eyes bloomed with cold light.

The Forbidden Temple is not a benevolent force, and the Lord of the Forbidden Temple is not a benevolent person.

"Attack these universes and attract Daoshan Dao Ancestor to come out!"

The Forbidden Hall Master commanded.

"Yes!"

The Taoist ancestors of the Forbidden Hall answered.

One Dao Ancestor made a move, and in an instant, the universes were blown up, like fireworks blooming in the chaos, causing a terrifying tide of chaotic energy.

This tide of chaotic energy hit the Dao Mountain Realm, causing the Dao Mountain Realm to tremble.

Every universe is blown up, which means that all the living beings in a universe have been destroyed, and the number of dead living beings is almost impossible to count.

But for the Dao Ancestors, this is nothing.

But for the creatures in the universe, this is simply the end of the world!

Daoshan boundary.

One Dao Ancestor after another was shocked, and they all leaned out of their divine senses to look at the chaos outside the Dao Mountain Realm.

When they saw that the dependent universes were struck by the rays of light and turned into countless pieces, they were immediately furious.

Their Dao Mountain has always been the number one transcendent force in the Dao Mountain Realm, even if the emergence of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has changed the power of the Dao Mountain Realm, and their Dao Mountain has also taken refuge in the Tianhai Sect.

But out of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, currently in the chaos of the Daoshan Realm, their Daoshan is still the number one force.

Although other forces have united together, there are a lot of Dao Ancestors, but the Dao Mountain Realm has the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Five Heavens, then Dao Mountain is the Five Heavens Force, although the Star Horn Beast clan also has the Five Heavens Dao Ancestor, but the Star Horn Beast Clan is not good, the number of Dao Ancestors is not large, and they are not qualified to compete with the Dao Mountain, and the other forces are at most the Four Heavens Force.

Therefore, they have enough arrogance and confidence in Daoshan, and they don't think that there are forces that dare to fight them.

But now, someone actually came to the door and destroyed so many subsidiary universes, this is a provocation to Daoshan, and it is to start a war with Daoshan!

Rumble!!!!

One by one, the Dao Ancestor of Dao Mountain flew out of the Dao Mountain Realm, and even the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor, the realm master of the Dao Mountain Realm, also came out.

There are also a lot of Dao Ancestors in Dao Mountain, and the specific number is very mysterious, but now almost all the Dao Ancestors in Dao Mountain have come out, and their number is also very shocking, nearly three hundred Dao Ancestors.

The key is that the Dao Ancestor's Dao Ancestor is of very high quality, unlike the original Void Heaven One Vein, which is basically a one-tier Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

One Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, nine Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, dozens of Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, close to a hundred Twofold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the rest are One-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

This scale is enough to easily defeat the Void Heaven One Vein, even the overall strength of the Forbidden Hall is not as good as Dao Mountain.

But at this moment, the Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall did not have the slightest fear.

"It's you, the hall master of the Forbidden Palace, you brought more than a hundred Dao Ancestors to me, and you destroyed so many of my universes, could it be that you want to start a war with our Dao Mountain?"

Daoshan Daozu asked.

"That's right!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said coldly.

"You've thought it through!" Daoshan Dao Ancestor warned, "If there is a war, your Forbidden Palace may be completely destroyed, and you may also fall and die!"

"Are you scared?" the Forbidden Hall Lord sneered.

"Joke, I'll be afraid?" Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor said domineeringly: "I am the cultivation pioneer of the Dao Mountain Realm, and I am also the peak Dao Ancestor of the Fifth Heaven, and I will be able to step into the ranks of the Sixth Heavenly Dao Ancestor in the near future, I will be afraid of your forbidden hall?"

"Aren't you afraid?"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall stepped out, and the aura belonging to the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor burst out: "Then now, are you afraid?"

"What, you have stepped into the ranks of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors? How is it possible, your foundation is not stable, and your origin is even more flawed, it is impossible to break through so quickly!"

Daoshan Daozu couldn't believe it.

"Die!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall stopped talking nonsense and killed him with a spear weapon.

This weapon is not an ordinary weapon, but a low-level forbidden weapon, he has been wandering on the edge of the dark forbidden domain for a long time, and he has indeed obtained some forbidden strange things, plus some forbidden strange things that the forbidden temple harvested from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, he spent most of the forbidden strange things to create this low-level forbidden weapon.

Although the level is not high, this forbidden strange thing can increase his combat power by at least fifty percent.

"I'm afraid you won't make it?"

Daoshan Daozu also killed the past.

Although his strength did not break through to the ranks of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, it was still much stronger than in the past.

But as soon as he confronted the hall master of the Forbidden Palace, his color changed.

Rumble!!!!

Daoshan Daozu was directly blasted away, and the forbidden weapon spear even poked a bloody hole in his body.

In this collision, Daoshan Daozu was completely at a disadvantage.

"Forbidden Field!

Countless forbidden powers turned into forbidden realms, enveloping this area, restraining Daoshan Dao Ancestor, and the terrifying dark forbidden power continued to invade Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor's body, affecting his body again and again.

The forbidden realm is very powerful, and it is an ability that only exists after the forbidden body is small, but it takes a lot of dark forbidden power to maintain, and unless it is a life and death fight, ordinary people who have mastered the power of dark forbidden will not open it.

But the hall master of the Forbidden Hall didn't care about this in order to kill Daoshan Dao Ancestor, and directly attacked and killed Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor in the strongest form.

Knock knock knock!!!

Daoshan Daozu has been hit hard again and again, and the strength of the two sides is not at the same level at all.

The combat power of the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor was just an ordinary Fivefold Heavenly Peak Dao Ancestor, and as soon as the Hall Master of the Forbidden Hall broke through to the realm of the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, his combat power soared directly to the top of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Of course, this is the strength that has only been improved with the help of the power of the dark forbidden and the forbidden body, if there is no dark forbidden power and the forbidden body, the hall master of the forbidden hall is just an ordinary fivefold heavenly dao ancestor.

The other side.

The Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain and the Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall began to fight, and they thought that the Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain could crush the Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall with their quantity and quality.

However, an unexpected scene happened!

The Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall have almost moved the essence of the Forbidden Palace, and all kinds of treasures that increase combat power have been used, and all kinds of life-saving things have also been used.

Therefore, although the Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain have the upper hand, it is more difficult to kill the Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Palace, and it will take a long time.

After all, when the difference in strength is not too big, it is more difficult for one Dao Ancestor to kill another.

The Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall had a very simple idea, that is, to delay the time and delay until the Forbidden Hall Lord killed the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor.

In that case, the Forbidden Hall Master would be able to help them kill the Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain.

As the days passed, Daoshan Daozu's injuries became more and more serious.

It seems that defeat is inevitable, and if no one comes to his rescue, he will eventually fall.

Although he took refuge in the Tianhai Sect, the Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect were not willing to pay a huge price to wake up from their slumber and come to rescue him!

Therefore, no one will come to his rescue!

"Forbidden Hall Master, let's make peace, I am willing to pay the treasure to compensate you!"

Daoshan Daozu begged for mercy.

As the founder of the Daoshan Realm and the first Dao Ancestor of the Daoshan Realm, what a shame it was for him to beg for mercy like this, it can be said that the prestige accumulated over countless years collapsed in an instant today.

"Beg for mercy, dream!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said coldly.

He didn't dare to spare Daoshan Dao Ancestor, in case Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor broke through into the Six Heavens Force not long after, he would not be an opponent.

When the time comes, Daoshan Daozu is afraid that he will come to take revenge on him.

He didn't want to see that kind of scene, so he had to kill Daoshan Daozu today.
